message:
fix(core): correct blob default formatting and align UnaryOp field names

- Blob literals now render each byte as zero-padded hex (format!("{:02X}"))
  instead of relying on Display of the raw Vec, producing correct
  X'AABB' output for PRAGMA table_info default_value columns.
- Adapted UnaryOp destructuring to renamed fields (expr → inner,
  BitwiseNot → BitNot) matching upstream parser AST changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
